name: James Spaulding
abstract: James Ralph Spaulding Jr. (was born July 30, 1937) is an American jazz saxophonist and flutist.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Jazz Stars at Midnight
New York Jazz Repertory Company: Jazz With a Spanish Tinge

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Stewart
about_quotes.evidence: McCoy Tyner had recorded an album called “Tender Moments,” all right? With Lee Morgan and James Spaulding... Howard Johnson was on the album on tuba and on baritone sax, he couldn’t make it sometimes so he’d call me and that was my first jazz experience, in McCoy Tyner’s band... doing the music from
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Stewart interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 24, 2006

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: He had a sextet that could play straight ahead, out, all kinds of stuff: Freddie Waits, Bennie Maupin, James Spaulding. ... One of the last groups was a quintet, I think, with Spaulding and Freddie
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Larry Ridley
about_quotes.evidence: Freddie Hubbard and James Spaulding and a lot of us, we had our own little bands and we were playing jazz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Larry Ridley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 10, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Griffin
about_quotes.evidence: I’m not sure when James Spaulding was in the band but he’s still with us. So ain’t but a handful of people, I would say maybe four or five at the most, that go back as deep as Marshall and Julian Priester and myself played in the band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Griffin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 12, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: David Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: So we got Pete La Roca and James Spaulding... And Pete La Roca and James Spaulding were great. And that’s what started it. It morphed into what the Cookers are today
about_quotes.doc_title: David Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Vega
about_quotes.evidence: one of the guys that was playing with Doc that would come to play many times with Doc was James Spaulding... These are people that I came into contact with.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Vega interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 20, 2023
